# Shubham Sunny
> I help businesses fix websites, scrape data, and build software that works. Eight years in, the work is still straightforward: understand what you need, build it properly, and hand it over with clear docs so you are not stuck for every small change. I review every project personally. Deep handles QA, Shushma runs people and outreach, and Vinay keeps larger builds on track.

## Services
- [Website Modernization](https://shubhamsunny.com/services/web-modernization): Modern sites that load fast and get you more calls. Modern, mobile-first websites that convert visitors into customers.
- [Data Scraping](https://shubhamsunny.com/services/data-scraping): Extract data from any website or mobile app. Competitor intelligence, product catalogs, images — scraped cleanly and delivered ready to use.
- [Custom Software](https://shubhamsunny.com/services/custom-software): Web, mobile, desktop, and bots — built for you. From web apps to Android apps, Chrome extensions, and Telegram/WhatsApp bots.

## Website packages
- Starter Refresh: from $499 USD — Quick fixes when your site mostly works but looks dated or slow on phones.
- Business Modernization: from $1,499 USD — Full redesign for small businesses — the package most clients pick when their site needs a proper refresh, not just a patch.
- Growth Website: from $2,999 USD — For businesses that want blog, analytics, and lead capture built in from day one.
## Service-specific packages
- Starter Refresh (web-modernization): from $499 USD — Targeted fixes without a full rebuild — good when the structure is fine but mobile and speed need work.
- One-Time Scrape (data-scraping): from $200 USD — Perfect for a single dataset or competitor snapshot.
- MVP Build (custom-software): from $1,999 USD — Validate your idea fast with a working prototype.
- Business Modernization (web-modernization): from $1,499 USD — Full redesign — our most common pick for small businesses ready to look current online.
- Monitoring Plan (data-scraping): from $499 USD — Ongoing price or listing tracking — set and forget.
- Full Application (custom-software): from $4,999 USD — Complete custom app — bots, dashboards, mobile, or tools.
- Growth Website (web-modernization): from $2,999 USD — Everything in Business plus blog, analytics, and lead forms for growing companies.
- Enterprise Pipeline (data-scraping): from $1,499 USD — Large-scale scraping with direct database delivery.
- Monthly Retainer (custom-software): from $999 USD — Ongoing development after launch or for evolving products.
## Portfolio
- Restaurant Website Redesign (Food & Hospitality): Full mobile-first rebuild for a family restaurant — scrollable menu, sticky call button, sub-2s load on 4G. Client requested no public demo or branding.
- Dental Clinic Modernization (Healthcare): Trust-first healthcare site with doctor profiles, insurance logos, and online booking. Live URL withheld per clinic NDA.
- High-Performance Data Dashboard (Data & Analytics): Full-stack data explorer over 1M scraped records — server-side search, filter, sort. Client does not permit public access to live environment.
- Offline-First Business App (Retail): PWA for field teams — shop and checkout offline, automatic sync when back online. Demo locked per client request.
- Smart Admin Platform (Enterprise): JSON-driven admin platform — pages and forms from schema, role-based access. Enterprise client — no public demo.
- Plugin Marketplace Platform (SaaS): VS Code-style plugin host with fault isolation and E2E tests. SaaS client requested confidential delivery only.
## Before & After transformations
- Local Dental Clinic (Healthcare): Their 2015 template looked outdated on phones. We rebuilt it with clear booking buttons and a modern, trustworthy design.
- Family Restaurant (Food & Hospitality): Slow, cluttered homepage → clean menu, hours, and click-to-call. Customers started calling from mobile within the first week.
- Law Office (Professional Services): Generic template → professional look that matches their reputation. Clear practice areas and a simple contact form.

- Competitor Analysis Report (Data Scraping): Founder tracked 8 rivals manually. Now gets a Monday PDF with pricing + feature changes.
- Offline-First Mobile App (Custom Software): Technicians in dead zones. App works offline, syncs when signal returns.
- Dental Clinic Modernization (Web Modernization): Old site looked sketchy. Online bookings = 35% of new patients.
- Amazon Product Scraper (Data Scraping): 200K+ ASINs indexed with daily price tracking. Found 3 niches to expand into.
- WhatsApp Order Bot (Custom Software): 40+ unread WhatsApps at peak. Bot cut errors 90%, orders take 90 seconds.
- Law Firm Website (Web Modernization): Prospects almost did not call because the site did not match the firm.
- Real Estate Listing Aggregator (Data Scraping): Checked 6 listing sites daily. One dashboard + instant alerts for new deals.
## FAQ
- Q: How long has your team been in business? A: Since 2018 — about 8 years now. Most clients find us on Fiverr or through referrals. We have delivered 163+ projects across websites, data scraping, and custom software.
- Q: What is included in a website modernization project? A: A mobile-first site that loads fast and makes calling or booking easy. Hosting, SSL, and handoff included.
- Q: Is web data scraping legal and compliant? A: We collect publicly visible data only — no private logins. Every project starts with a scope review.
- Q: What does custom software development include? A: Web apps, mobile apps, bots, and tools built for your workflow when off-the-shelf products do not fit.
- Q: Price and timeline? A: Websites from $499 (Starter Refresh). Business modernization from $1,499. Scraping from ~$200. Custom software after discovery. Most web projects: 2–4 weeks.
- Q: Do I need technical knowledge? A: No. We handle servers, code, and deployment — you approve outcomes in plain English.
- Q: US / UK time zones? A: Yes. We schedule calls and updates around your timezone.
- Q: How do we start? A: Use the contact form at the bottom of the page — we reply within one business day.
- Q: Do you build WhatsApp or Telegram bots? A: Yes — order bots, lead qualifiers, and customer support flows. We scope the conversation, build it, and hand over docs so your team can run it.
- Q: Can you work with my existing hosting? A: Usually yes. We can redesign on your current host or migrate to something faster — we document logins and handoff either way.
- Q: What support do I get after launch? A: Every project includes a handoff guide. Optional monthly care covers updates, backups, and small content changes so you are not stuck alone.
- Q: Will you sign an NDA? A: Yes, for client work that needs confidentiality. Many portfolio pieces stay private — we are used to working under NDA.

## Digital products
- Competitor Intel Dashboard (invite-only): Daily pricing & catalog tracking — on autopilot. A private dashboard that scrapes competitor websites every night and delivers clean price-change alerts to your inbox. Built for e-commerce brands tired of manual checks. Ideal for: E-commerce brands, Amazon sellers, retail chains
- Lead Enrichment Engine (invite-only): Turn a company name into a full sales profile. Paste a list of company names — get back emails, social profiles, tech stack, and employee count. Built for agencies and B2B sales teams who need data fast. Ideal for: Sales agencies, outbound teams, recruiters
- White-Label Client Portal (by-request): Your clients log in — you look professional at scale. A branded portal where your clients track project progress, approve designs, and download deliverables. Built for freelancers and small agencies scaling up. Ideal for: Agencies, consultants, dev shops
- Business Automation Hub (by-request): Connect your tools — kill the repetitive work. Custom integrations between your CRM, email, spreadsheets, and messaging apps. When off-the-shelf Zapier isn't enough, we build the exact workflow you need. Ideal for: Operations teams, growing SMBs, SaaS startups

## About
Eight years in, the work is still straightforward: understand what you need, build it properly, and hand it over with clear docs so you are not stuck for every small change. I review every project personally. Deep handles QA, Shushma runs people and outreach, and Vinay keeps larger builds on track.
Philosophy: I'd rather take a week longer and ship something solid than rush something you'll need fixed in a month.

## Blog (full article text)
### 5 Signs Your Website Is Costing You Customers
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/signs-your-website-is-costing-customers
- Published: 2026-06-01
- Category: Website Tips
- Excerpt: If your site looks outdated on mobile or takes forever to load, you are losing business every day. Here is what to watch for.
#### Your site is your first salesperson
Most small business owners invest in signs, ads, or referrals — then ignore the one place every stranger checks first: your website. If it looks outdated, loads slowly, or breaks on phones, you lose trust before anyone picks up the phone.
After 150+ projects, these are the five patterns I see most often — and they cost real money every week.
#### 1. It looks wrong on a phone
Open your site on your phone right now. Can you read the menu or services without zooming? Is the phone number visible without scrolling? If not, roughly 80% of your Google traffic is having the same problem.
Fix: mobile-first layout, readable text size, sticky call button.
#### 2. It takes more than 3 seconds to load
People leave slow sites. Google ranks them lower too. Old WordPress themes, uncompressed images, and cheap hosting are the usual culprits.
Fix: modern static build, WebP images, proper hosting — often a full refresh is cheaper than patching a 2015 theme forever.
#### 3. Visitors cannot tell what you do in 5 seconds
If someone lands on your homepage and thinks “what is this company?” — they leave. Clear headline, one photo of your work, and a single obvious next step (call, book, quote).
#### 4. No proof you are real
Missing address, no photos of your team or work, generic stock images, no reviews — all signal “maybe scam.” Local businesses need local trust cues: real photos, Google reviews, hours, insurance logos where relevant.
#### 5. Contact is buried
Forms that go nowhere, phone numbers only in the footer, no WhatsApp — every extra click kills leads. Put contact where thumbs reach on mobile.
If two or more of these sound familiar, a modernization project usually pays for itself within weeks of extra calls or bookings. We offer a free review — no pitch, just an honest look at what is costing you customers.
### What Mobile-Friendly Actually Means
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/what-mobile-friendly-means
- Published: 2026-06-10
- Category: Plain English
- Excerpt: No jargon — just what mobile-friendly means for your business and why it matters for US customers.
#### Not just “it shrinks on a phone”
Mobile-friendly does not mean your desktop site gets tiny. It means the layout, buttons, and text were designed for a small touch screen first — then scaled up for desktop.
Google uses mobile-first indexing: it primarily looks at your mobile version when deciding how to rank you.
#### What good looks like
Text you can read without pinching. Buttons big enough for a thumb. No horizontal scrolling. Images that load fast on cellular data. Forms that work with autofill.
Test on an older Android phone on 4G, not just your latest iPhone on WiFi — that is what many of your customers use.
#### Why US customers care
US consumers search on phones during lunch breaks, in parking lots, between meetings. If your competitor’s site loads in 2 seconds and yours takes 8, they call your competitor.
Mobile-friendly is not a nice-to-have for restaurants, dentists, contractors, and local services — it is the main storefront.
### How Long Does a Website Redesign Take?
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/how-long-website-redesign-takes
- Published: 2026-06-15
- Category: Process
- Excerpt: A realistic timeline for small business website projects — from first call to launch.
#### Typical timeline: 2–4 weeks
For a small business site (5–8 pages), most projects land between two and four weeks from kickoff to launch. Not because we drag — because you need time to approve design and send photos.
#### Week 1 — Discovery & plan
We review your current site, list what is costing leads, collect content (services, photos, hours), and agree on sitemap. You get a clear scope and fixed price before build starts.
#### Week 2 — Design
Mockups for homepage and one inner page. Usually two revision rounds. Goal: you can show it to a colleague and they immediately understand what you do.
#### Week 3 — Build & content
Development, mobile QA, forms, analytics, speed tuning. We enter your content or help you write plain-English copy that converts.
#### Week 4 — Launch
DNS, SSL, final device testing, handoff doc. Optional: we stay on for small updates the first month.
Rush jobs are possible for simpler sites; complex e-commerce or custom features need longer — we always give a realistic date upfront, not a surprise delay later.
### When Does Data Scraping Actually Make Sense?
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/when-data-scraping-makes-sense
- Published: 2026-06-18
- Category: Data & Automation
- Excerpt: Stop copy-pasting from competitor sites — here is when automation pays for itself (and when it does not).
#### Copy-paste is not a strategy
If someone on your team spends hours every week copying prices, listings, or leads from websites into Excel — that is a signal scraping might pay for itself in days.
Scraping means automated collection of public data: competitor prices, product catalogs, job listings, reviews — delivered on a schedule to CSV, JSON, or your database.
#### When it is worth it
You check the same sites repeatedly. Data goes stale before you finish a category. You need alerts when something changes. Manual work does not scale past a few dozen items.
When it is not: one-time lookup of ten URLs — just do it manually. We will tell you honestly if automation is overkill.
#### Legal & ethical basics
We only collect publicly visible data — no bypassing logins or paywalls. Every project starts with a scope review so you know exactly what is collected and how it will be used.
### What It's Like Working With Us
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/why-we-do-not-take-every-project
- Published: 2026-06-22
- Category: How we work
- Excerpt: Eight years and 163+ projects in — here's how we actually work, from first message to handoff.
#### Eight years in
I started on Fiverr in 2018 doing website fixes and small builds. Over time that turned into a small studio — same core people, same way of working. We are not a 200-person agency. We are a founder-led team that has shipped 163+ projects for clients in the US, UK, India, and the Middle East.
#### How a typical project runs
First message → short call to understand the goal and budget. We send a clear scope and timeline before any payment. During the build you get updates in plain English — mockups to approve, weekly demos on bigger apps, QA on real phones before launch.
At handoff you get logins, a short guide, and direct contact info. Many clients come back months later for phase two — that is the relationship we care about.
#### When we are not the right fit
If you need the absolute cheapest quote with no discovery call, we are probably not it. If scope changes every day with no timeline adjustment, projects stall — we will say that upfront.
If you want a reliable partner who answers messages, documents handoff, and has been doing this for eight years — that is us.
### WhatsApp Bots for Local Business — Worth It?
- URL: https://shubhamsunny.com/blog/whatsapp-bots-for-local-business
- Published: 2026-06-26
- Category: Custom Software
- Excerpt: If customers message you on WhatsApp at 9 PM, a structured bot beats a messy inbox every time.
#### Your customers already use WhatsApp
For restaurants, clinics, and local shops in many markets, WhatsApp is the default — not email, not contact forms. If you answer manually at 9 PM, you lose orders. If you ignore messages, you lose trust.
#### What a bot actually does
Structured flow: menu → cart → address → payment link. Or: book appointment → pick service → confirm time. No more “which item?” back-and-forth during rush hour.
We have built bots that cut order errors by 90% for cloud kitchens and cut response time from hours to under two minutes for agencies.
#### Build vs generic widget
Generic chat widgets dump text into an inbox. Custom bots qualify, calculate, and push to your CRM or kitchen screen. Cost starts higher but ROI shows up in week one if volume is there.
